ads.headline: Your Business Qualifies for Grants
ads.body: Singapore SMEs — up to S$1M in govt grants available. EDG covers 70% of your upgrade costs. Free 60-sec scan. No obligation.
ads.image_description: Clean dark card with big green number 'Up to S$1,000,000' next to Singapore flag. Professional, minimal design with high contrast.

ads.headline: Hiring Is Expensive. Govt Pays You.
ads.body: Senior Employment Credit: up to 8% wage offset for workers 55+. CPF offsets too. Plus training subsidies. Free scan shows all.
ads.image_description: Employer desk with calculator and paperwork. Overlay text: 'Government pays up to 8% of senior worker wages' in bold green. Warm, human office setting.
